import React from 'react'; import { Github, Instagram, Linkedin, Mail, MapPin, Phone } from 'lucide-react'; const SOCIAL_LINKS = [ { label: 'Instagram', Icon: Instagram, url: 'https://instagram.com/dhakkhana.official' }, { label: 'GitHub', Icon: Github, url: 'https://github.com/dhakkhana' }, { label: 'LinkedIn', Icon: Linkedin, url: 'https://www.linkedin.com/in/dhakkhana' }, ]; const QUICK_LINKS = [ { label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'About Us', href: '/#about' }, { label: 'Services', href: '/#services' }, { label: 'Contact', href: '/#contact' }, ]; const CONTACT_POINTS = [ { label: 'Head Office', value: 'Dak Bhavan, Sansad Marg, New Delhi - 110001', Icon: MapPin }, { label: 'Mobile', value: '+91 98765 43210', Icon: Phone }, { label: 'Email', value: 'hello@dakkhana.in', Icon: Mail }, ]; export default function SiteFooter() { return (

Dakkhana

Delivering trust across Bharat

A contemporary digital avatar of Dak Seva. Track parcels, manage bookings, and stay close to government services from one dashboard.

); }
